name: argo-cd-apps
description: Author and maintain Argo CD `Application` and `ApplicationSet` manifests as a GitOps consumer (publisher), targeting Argo CD v3.3 / v3.4 (May 2026). Covers source types (Helm, Kustomize, OCI, multi-source, plugin), sync policies + options + waves + hooks, ApplicationSet generators (List, Cluster, Git, Matrix, Merge, SCMProvider, PullRequest, Plugin, ClusterDecisionResource), Progressive Sync (Beta), Source Hydrator (still Alpha), AppProjects, RBAC, sync impersonation (`destinationServiceAccounts`), GPG/cosign signature verification, GitOps repo layout (mono vs poly, app-of-apps vs ApplicationSet — Argo recommends ApplicationSet first), troubleshooting drift / OutOfSync / sync loops / stuck-deletion / hook failures, and v3.0→v3.4 changes (annotation tracking default, SSA-migration regression, CVE-2026-42880 Secret leak). NOT for installing or operating the Argo CD control plane (HA, Dex, repo-server tuning, UI customization).
